create_entry.refresh_message: You need to refresh the page after adding UIX for the Frontend resource to load. Click finish and then refresh the page.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only a single instance of UIX can be added.
abort.old_frontend_script_resource: Conflicting Frontend script resource {resource} is registered as a Dashboard resource. Please remove it before adding UIX.
abort.old_frontend_script_extra_module: Conflicting Frontend script resource {resource} is registered as an extra module. Please remove it before adding UIX.

data.dialog_apply_after_show: Delay UIX styling for dialogs until fully shown

data_description.hass_throttle_enable: When enabled, reduces the frequency at which the dashboard root re-renders when entity states change rapidly.
data_description.hass_throttle_ms: Minimum time between entity state update re-renders. Only applies when throttling is enabled.
data_description.dialog_apply_after_show: When enabled, UIX styles for dialogs are applied after the dialog's open animation completes rather than immediately. This can reduce visual flicker on slower devices.

add_foundry.title: Add a UI foundry
add_foundry.description: Enter a name and configuration for the new UI foundry. The config should be a mapping that may include 'forge', 'element', and/or 'uix' keys.

edit_foundry.title: Edit a UI foundry
edit_foundry.description: Select the UI foundry you want to edit.

edit_foundry_config.title: Edit UI foundry "{name}"
edit_foundry_config.description: Update the configuration for this UI foundry.

register_foundry_file.title: Register a foundry file
register_foundry_file.description: Enter the path to a YAML file that contains foundries under a top-level 'uix_foundries' key. The path may be absolute or relative to the Home Assistant config directory.

deregister_foundry_file.title: Deregister a foundry file
deregister_foundry_file.description: Select the foundry file to deregister. The file itself is not deleted — only its registration with UIX is removed.

abort.no_foundries: No UI foundries are configured yet. Add one first.
abort.no_foundry_files: No foundry files are registered yet. Register one first.

error.invalid_config: The configuration must be a YAML mapping.
error.file_already_added: This file path is already registered.
error.file_not_found: The file was not found. Check the path and try again.
error.file_parse_error: The file could not be parsed as YAML. Check the file for syntax errors.
error.file_invalid_structure: The file must be a YAML mapping.
error.file_missing_key: The file must have a top-level 'uix_foundries' key.
error.file_invalid_foundries: The 'uix_foundries' key must be a YAML mapping of foundry names to configurations.
